title: galium diphyllum
intro: Galium diphyllum, also known as fetid bedstraw or sweet-scented bedstraw, is a perennial herb belonging to the bedstraw family (Rubiaceae). This plant has been used in traditional medicine due to its antiseptic and anti-inflammatory properties, which make it effective in treating wounds, skin infections, and digestive issues. The health benefits of Galium diphyllum include reducing inflammation, fighting bacterial and fungal infections, and acting as an antitussive to relieve coughs. Herbal preparations of Galium diphyllum can be found in the form of teas, tinctures, and infusions, often used to treat a range of health issues, from respiratory problems to skin conditions.
